subject: ad-toycar-int4-weight-only
notes: ToyCar dev-set test files, 4 machine IDs (2459 files total), per-ID AUC averaged (matches 01_test.py's metric). MLPerf Tiny reference ballpark: AUC >= 0.83; published runs vary ~0.80-0.85 depending on training-set composition and seed -- this uses the committed reference checkpoint as-is, no retraining. Weight-only NNCF compression (nncf.compress_weights) -- activations and the matmul itself still execute fp32/fp16 on OpenVINO CPU, so this is a real accuracy number but NOT a measured or achievable throughput point; scripts/make_pareto.py projects its x-axis compute multiplier from issue #10's L0b soft-logic MAC densities, not from this run.
